title: helianthemum niloticum var. microcarpum
intro: Helianthemum niloticum var. microcarpum, also known as Egyptian rose or sun rose, is a flowering plant species belonging to the rockrose family (Cistaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which can help to treat various health conditions. The plant's medicinal properties have been associated with several health benefits, including wound healing, relief from digestive issues, and protection against certain infections. In herbal preparations, Helianthemum niloticum var. microcarpum is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
